wins: Strong Q4 and full year results with adjusted operating income at record highs
Achieved $4 billion in DRIVE cost savings ahead of schedule
Positive revenue growth inflection in Q4
Improved service and speed advantages attracting customers
Successful integration of One FedEx and Network 2.0
risks: Decline in revenue compared to initial growth expectations
Headwinds from USPS contract termination in Q2
International yield pressures from increased capacity in global air cargo market
Uncertainty around demand environment and macroeconomic factors
Potential network disruption from Network 2.0 integration
